title: ActionLib
body:
**This is a developer library for registering HoverEvent.Action**

After registering,
- Correctly parsing HoverEvent json with /tellraw
- Use HoverEvent in book

Example Used By:
- [ChatImage](https://modrinth.com/project/chatimage)

How to use ->[Read Me]([https://github.com/kitUIN/ActionLib](https://github.com/kitUIN/ActionLib))
